description.ko: 기하학적 유리를 통한 빛의 분산과 무지개 빛 가스틱의 복잡한 전시.
description.en: A complex display of light dispersion and rainbow caustics through geometric glass.

prompt: A high-precision optical render of PRISM-2, titled 'The Refractive Symphony.' Multifaceted geometric glass sculptures refracting a beam of white light into a brilliant spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet. Soft #FFFF00 yellow caustic patterns dance on a dark matte surface. Macro focus on internal reflections and intense chromatic aberration, 8k resolution, minimalist aesthetic.
